# Changelog

# 📦 0.13.0-beta

## 📰 General changes and notes

Summary of changes here!

<details open>
<summary>Github Commits :octocat:</summary>
<blockquote>

- Added Unbound Quest (ToshibaEC0Microwave)
- Added Radical Red Quests (ToshibaEC0Microwave)

- Fix multiple typos, including in one asset name (RupinderM)
- Updated PT_BR localization (PrincessStellar)
- Revert miltank interaction changes (LobsterJonn)
- Removed shiny card quests and jei (LovGo)
- Take out twilight forest quests and references (LobsterJonn)
- replaced zygarde cube recipe (LobsterJonn)
- corrected bucketst team (LobsterJonn)
- add warning for ender storage removal (LobsterJonn)
- Re-enabled mekmm cnc lathe (LobsterJonn)
- Allow master ball to ignore OOB catch restrictions (SouDescolado)
- BeeBee on Vacation (in Productive Bees Quests) (DivineFinal)
- update structures and add futuristic steelworks for Dan & Nofaxu encounter (Uncandango)
- fix: rgs modpack ordering, disabled some radical red leaders wild spawn, updated quests with that info (Uncandango)
- Remove Piglich Prediction Quest (DivineFinal)
- replace pokeballs loot with parts (affects pickup cobbleworkers) (Uncandango)
- Exposed Cobblefurnies stove inventory (LobsterJonn)
- Added recipe for egg incubator (LobsterJonn)
- Fixed inconsistencies with egg level (LobsterJonn)
- Fixed males laying the eggs (LobsterJonn)
- Proper MooMoo milking (LobsterJonn)
- Rebalanced poketokens (LobsterJonn)
- Fixed incubators not displaying inventory client side when piping in (LobsterJonn)


</blockquote>

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>allthemons/assembler/pokemon_egg_incubator</summary>

```diff
+{
+  type: "oritech:assembler"
+  fluidInput: {
+    amount: 0
+    fluid: "minecraft:empty"
+  }
+  fluidOutputs: [
+  ]
+  ingredients: [
+    {
+      tag: "c:storage_blocks/lapis"
+    }
+    {
+      tag: "c:ingots/copper"
+    }
+    {
+      tag: "c:glass_blocks/colorless"
+    }
+    {
+      item: "cobblemon:protein"
+    }
+  ]
+  results: [
+    {
+      count: 1
+      id: "allthemons:pokemon_egg_incubator"
+    }
+  ]
+  time: 120
+}

```

<details>
<summary>occultism/ritual/craft_dimensional_extractor</summary>

```diff

+  type: "occultism:ritual"
```
